relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The second letter awakens sincere mind by reminder.
Remember prophets, Lord, Savior, and apostles.
Mockery follows desire in the last days.
The promise of arrival is questioned.
Creation by Divine word is willingly forgotten.
The old world passed through water.
The present order is kept for Divine reckoning.
Divine time is not measured like human impatience.
The Lord's patience is mercy, willing all to turn.
The day comes unexpectedly and reveals what is real.
Such release calls for holy conduct.
The day is awaited through reverent life.
New heavens and new earth hold dwelling justice.
Paul's writings contain difficult things that can be twisted.
Grow in grace and knowledge of Jesus Messiah.

contemplative_note: 2 Peter 3 is patience over panic: Divine time, mercy for turning, revealed works, dwelling justice, and growth in grace.
